message.content: {"interpreted_request": {"user_goal": "to create a no-op coordination request", "context": {"type": "coordination", "mode": "request", "action": "no_op", "description": "a coordination request that does not perform any action or change the state of the system."}}, "candidate_plans": [{"tasks": [{"task_id": "1", "requirement_name": "define_coordination_request", "description": "Define a coordination request with no-op action and appropriate parameters.", "expected_artifacts": ["coordination_request_json"]}], "execution_order": ["task_1"], "constraint_evidence": {"constraint_1": "the request must be in the form of JSON object", "constraint_2": "must include a 'type' field with value 'coordination'", "constraint_3": "must have 'mode', 'action', and 'description' fields"}}, {"tasks": [{"task_id": "2", "requirement_name": "generate_coordination_request", "description": "Generate the coordination request based on the defined parameters.", "expected_artifacts": ["coordination_request_json"]}], "execution_order": ["task_1", "task_2"], "constraint_evidence": {"constraint_1": "the generated request must be in JSON format", "constraint_2": "must include all required fields from the definition"}}, {"tasks": [{"task_id": "3", "requirement_name": "validate_coordination_request", "description": "Validate the generated coordination request against the defined requirements.", "expected_artifacts": ["validated_coordination_request_json"]}], "execution_order": ["task_2", "task_3"], "constraint_evidence": {"constraint_1": "must ensure all required fields are present and correct", "constraint_2": "check that the action is 'no_op'"}}]}
